title: Sofia Coppola

{{Quote|I asked George if I could come and watch the shoot, and he asked if I wanted to be in the royal entourage. (...) I'm at the back with a hood on and you can't really see me. I don't even remember what my character was called.|Sofia Coppola|<ref name="Empire">{{WebCite|url=https://www.empireonline.com/movies/features/sofia-coppola-sofia-coppola|text=Sofia Coppola: Film By Film. From The Godfather Part III to The Bling Ring|date=2013-02-07|author=SemlYen, Phil de|work=[[Wikipedia:Empire (magazine)|''Empire'']]|archivedate=20181206061826}}</ref>}}
'''Sofia Coppola''' (born [[May 14]], [[1971]]) is an American screenwriter, director, producer, and actor<ref name="Britannica" /> who has a cameo as [[Saché]], one of [[Padmé Amidala|Queen Amidala's]] [[handmaiden]]s, in the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars:'' Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref>{{Film|I}}</ref> She is the sister of [[Roman Coppola]],<ref name="The Age">{{WebCite|url=https://www.theage.com.au/culture/movies/producer-roman-coppola-s-great-ambition-opening-a-theme-park-20230804-p5du0u.html|text=How Roman Coppola hopes to change the future of film using Blockchain|author=Wilson, Jack|date=2023-08-14|quote=Not that the Coppola brand these days is about Francis alone. There's Roman's sister Sofia, director of ''The Virgin Suicides'' and ''Lost in Translation''; their mother Eleanor has made films too, both documentary and fiction.|work=[[Wikipedia:The Age|''The Age'']]|archivedate=20230923111154}}</ref> and daughter of director [[Wikipedia:Francis Ford Coppola|Francis Ford Coppola]],<ref name="Britannica" /> a longtime friend of [[George Lucas]].<ref>{{WebCite|url=https://ew.com/article/2015/12/08/francis-ford-coppola-star-wars-george-lucas|text=Francis Ford Coppola calls George Lucas's attachment to Star Wars franchise a pity|author=Bacle, Ariana|date=2015-12-08|quote=Francis Ford Coppola and George Lucas go way back. They were friends long before either was famous, and Coppola was almost like a cool older brother who eventually helped get Lucas's first film, ''THX 1138'', off the ground.|work=''[[Entertainment Weekly]]''|archivedate=20211006014905}}</ref> She is known for playing [[Wikipedia:Mary Corleone|Mary Corleone]] in the 1990 film [[Wikipedia:The Godfather Part III|''The Godfather Part III'']] and for writing and directing titles such as the 1999 drama film [[Wikipedia:The Virgin Suicides (film)|''The Virgin Suicides'']], the 2003 comedy-drama [[Wikipedia: Lost in Translation (film)|''Lost in Translation'']], the 2006 historical drama [[Wikipedia:Marie Antoinette (2006 film)|''Marie Antoinette'']] and the 2017 thriller drama [[Wikipedia:The Beguiled (2017 film)|''The Beguiled'']].<ref name="Britannica" />

==Biography==
Coppola considers director [[George Lucas]], a long-time friend and working partner of her father [[Wikipedia:Francis Ford Coppola|Francis Ford Coppola]], "like an uncle to me—he used to send me and my brother [[Roman Coppola|Roman]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' toys when we were little," and upon hearing he was going back to the saga, "thought it'd be so fun to see how they make them" as she was preparing her own directorial debut [[Wikipedia:The Virgin Suicides (film)|''The Virgin Suicides'']], released that same [[1999|year]]. When she asked Lucas if she could attend the shoot, he offered her the role of [[Saché]], and she accepted as "it seemed like a good vantage point to watch without getting in the way."<ref name="Empire" />
